svg.title: Insulation R-value by IECC climate zone: Florida and North Carolina
svg.desc: Schematic showing Florida climate zones 1 to 2 and North Carolina climate zones 3A to 5A with prescriptive ceiling and wall R-value ranges. Original Creator OS drawing, values from the public-domain DOE Building America restatement.
svg.text: Prescriptive insulation R-value by climate zone
air seal; no interior vapor barrier
3A coast: ceil R30 to R49, wall R20
wall R20+5 to R30, floor R30
values rise from coast to mountains
look up the county zone in the DOE table
Ranges span recent editions; confirm the exact value for your adopted edition and county climate zone.
Original Creator OS drawing (CC0); values from the public-domain DOE Building America restatement of IECC/IRC minimums.
